evidence.decolonization: Module frames Ukrainian ballad tradition as autonomous and European-connected without flattening it into imperial or generic East Slavic categories.
evidence.learner_surface: Ukrainian-facing module, activities, generated MDX, and resources avoid internal IDs, process register, English leakage, and writer-facing grading language.
evidence.review: Claude Opus 4.8 initial review found one learner-facing resource-title blocker and two provenance findings; follow-up approved after Ukrainian source_ref attempt, same-chunk quote confirmation, and Dunai paraphrase.
evidence.source_hygiene: Both quoted Ой на горі вогонь горить fragments were verified with repo source tooling and confirmed by Claude follow-up via chunk context; unsafe or non-corpus items remain context-only or paraphrased, and no fabricated hosted reading page is used.
